function.name: classify_landform_slope
function.description: Classify a slope based on gradient angle in degrees.

function.name: estimate_erosion_rate
function.description: Estimate soil erosion rate from rainfall and slope.

prompt: I'm studying a hillslope at 22 degrees with 1200 mm annual rainfall and 18% slope. Classify the slope type and estimate erosion rate.

function.name: transcribe_uncial
function.description: Transcribe uncial script to modern Latin.

prompt: Codex Sinaiticus folio 42r — please run radiocarbon on sample CSF-42 (c14 ratio 0.78) and identify the scribal hand from image folios/CSF42r.tif.

function.name: calc_sand_binder_ratio
function.description: Compute sand-to-binder ratio for green sand mold.

function.name: set_pouring_temperature
function.description: Set pouring temperature for given alloy.

function.name: estimate_solidification_time
function.description: Estimate cooling time of a casting.

prompt: I'm pouring grey cast iron at 1380 C. Set the furnace temperature and estimate solidification time for a casting volume 850 cm3, surface 420 cm2.

function.name: analyze_birdsong_spectrogram
function.description: Analyze audio recording for vocalization signature.

function.name: fetch_migration_pattern
function.description: Get migration data for a species.

prompt: Saw 7 Bohemian waxwings at Riga Botanical Garden. Log this and pull their typical migration pattern.

function.name: count_plankton_density
function.description: Count plankton per liter from microscopy.

prompt: Take salinity reading from station GBR-17 and count plankton in sample PLK-441.

function.name: appraise_gemstone_carat
function.description: Appraise a gem by carat weight and clarity.

function.name: measure_refractive_index
function.description: Measure refractive index of cut stone.

prompt: Appraise a 1.8 carat VVS1 diamond and measure refractive index of stone GEM-9921.

function.name: classify_drainage_network
function.description: Classify a drainage pattern (dendritic, trellis, etc).

function.name: compute_drainage_density
function.description: Compute total stream length over basin area.

prompt: For basin TIBR-04 with 312 km of streams over 84 km2: classify the drainage network and compute density.
Decipher ostracon LACH-22 (Old Hebrew) and look up its registry record.
Heat-treat 4140 steel at 845 C for 1.5 hours, then quench specimen S4140-08 in oil.
Identify feather from image feathers/F-9912.jpg and measure wing chord on specimen WC-9912.
Tag tiger shark TS-118 with a 69 kHz tracker and log dive depth 142 m.
Run Mohs test and UV fluorescence on stone OP-417.
Map alluvial fan at Death Valley site DV-NW1, and date sample DV-Q33 with OSL.
Translate this Demotic line 'pr-aA wDA snb' and look up provenance of papyrus P.Berol.13554.
Apply graphite release to mold M-77 and pour 12 kg of bronze.
Register nest box NB-203 in beech-oak habitat and record 5 eggs.
Deploy CTD at station P-46 to 1500 m depth and sample at 800 m.

function.name: appraise_market_value
function.description: Appraise market value of finished gem.

prompt: Polish cabochon CB-12 with 14000 grit, then appraise its market value.
Reach VOLG-12 — channel 88 km, valley 36 km. Compute sinuosity and classify the river stage.
Scan codex page CDX-89r with 12-band multispectral and reveal the palimpsest layer underneath.

function.name: design_gating_system
function.description: Design gating system for a casting.

prompt: Design gating for part P-981 (22 kg) and compute riser size.
Band juvenile peregrine falcon with band PF-2226 and measure its tarsus.
Transect T-19 has 62% seagrass coverage and I spotted a green turtle there. Record both.
Run SG and absorption spectroscopy on ruby R-555.
Project Aletsch glacier retreat over 50 years and measure moraine MR-A4.
RTI-scan tablet K.456 and transliterate the Akkadian.
Anneal brass specimen BR-44 at 650 C and pickle with sulfuric acid.
Set up 12 m mist net at Hortobagy and log capture of a great reed warbler there.
Deploy drift buoy at lat 36.5, lon -75.2 and estimate the eddy radius in the Gulf Stream region.
Facet-cut emerald EM-7 to step cut and apply cedar oil treatment.

function.name: trace_cave_passage
function.description: Trace a cave passage from survey.

prompt: Map sinkholes in Postojna karst at 2m resolution, trace cave PJ-Cave-04, and compute doline density.
On folio Vat.lat.3225 f.18r, run XRF on the ink, extract DNA from the vellum, and match the scribal hand against the Vatican corpus.
Burn out investment mold LW-12 at 720 C, pour silver, then X-ray the casting.

function.name: estimate_territory_size
function.description: Estimate territory size from singing posts.

prompt: Deploy AudioMoth at Bialowieza site for 48 hours, play wood warbler call for 90 s, and estimate the wood warbler territory size.
ROV dive at Lost City vent to 3000 m, measure vent temp, and collect a chimney sample.
Stone D-2025: test thermal conductivity, scan UV fluorescence at 365 nm, and grade clarity under 10x loupe.
Slope SLP-99 just got 220 mm rain. Run failure model, compute factor of safety, and identify the landslide type.

function.name: encode_minuscule_letterforms
function.description: Encode minuscule script in Unicode MUFI.

prompt: Take this minuscule transcription 'q̄ om̄s int̄ sciat': expand abbreviations and look up 'sciat'.
Aluminum casting P-7700, dim 240 mm, hotspots at flange and boss: design chill blocks, compute shrinkage compensation, and Chvorinov constant.
Deploy Motus tower at Long Point on 166.380 MHz, tag bird BX-91 with same freq nanotag, and start tracking stopover duration.
Deploy hydrophone at Stellwagen at 60 m for 14 days, then detect humpback calls in audio file aud-455.wav.
Tourmaline TM-19: test dichroism, weigh, and grade RGB color.
At Vesuvius site VS-3 at 88 cm depth: extract tephra sample TEPH-VS-3, run 40Ar/39Ar dating, and match to known eruption.
Damaged folio MS-Laud-Gr-35 f.7v in uncial — reconstruct letterforms from image lz/lg35-7v.tif and compare against known codex variants.
Centrifugal cast ring mold RM-22 at 450 rpm, polish with fine burr, and stamp 925 hallmark.
Deploy camera trap with high sensitivity at lek site LEK-7 and estimate capercaillie lek attendance for 2026-04-12.
Deploy Argo float at lat -42.0 lon 145.5 with 10-day cycle. Then for float ARGO-7711 fetch T and S profiles.
Run fire assay on 30 g of ore ORE-101 from Witwatersrand mine, compute Au:Ag ratio, and log provenance.

function.name: compute_strike_dip
function.description: Compute strike and dip from outcrop.

prompt: Outcrop OC-72 (San Andreas trace): compute strike/dip, identify fault type, and calculate slip vector.
Decode runic inscription 'ᚦᚢᛏᚱ ᚱᛁᛋᛏᛁ ᛋᛏᛁᚾ' and fetch Rundata entry for U-240.
Sand-cast engine block EB-77 from aluminum, 85 kg. Machine the cylinder bore to 92 mm, then pressure-test water jacket at 3.5 bar.
Nest SW-04 has 5 chicks. Ring chick with ring SW-04-A and log brood size.
Deploy BRUVS at Ningaloo at 18 m for 2 hours. Then for video N18-A1.mp4 compute MaxN per species and Shannon diversity at Ningaloo.
Stone SP-04 sapphire: birefringence test, pleochroism test, and 40x photomicroscopy of inclusions.
Barchan dune BD-21 in Namib at 9 m/s wind: model migration, measure slipface, and compute aspect ratio.
Manuscript Bamberg-Bibl.1, folio 12r: transcribe the Carolingian minuscule from image bamb1-12r.tif and compare to the Tours scriptorium.
Lot 22-A, specimen SP-201: spectrograph composition, tensile test at 0.5 mm/s, and compute yield strength.
Deploy 24-channel geophone array at Reykjanes, record microseismic for 60 min, then locate hypocenter of event RKN-225.
Decipher Linear B tablet PY Ta 707 and match to Pylos palace economy records.
Die-cast part DC-09 at 900 bar, then trim flash, and CT-scan for porosity.
Deploy radar at Falsterbo at 4.5 deg elevation, 60 km range, then for 2026-05-09 compute migration flux and altitude distribution.
Glider SG-661 mission: waypoints (lat 36.0 lon -10.0) to (lat 37.0 lon -11.5), max depth 1000 m, 21 days. Configure CTD+oxygen+chlorophyll sensors at 1 Hz and set Iridium every 30 min.

Batch B-2026-19: lost-wax pour molds LW-A1, LW-A2, LW-A3 in 18k yellow gold at 1050 C in argon. Burnout kiln K-2 ramp: 200 C/30 min then 740 C/60 min then 540 C/120 min. Weigh 420 g of 18k yellow gold.
For work TIBULLUS_LIBER_I, collate witnesses A,V,G,O with variant units lines 1.1, 1.5, 2.3, then compute Quentin distances and build critical apparatus over base text A.

Eurasian dipper at River Tweed: design CJS capture-recapture with 8 mist-net occasions, then fit model on data uri data/dipper-tweed.csv with covariates sex,age, then estimate adult survival rate from model CJS-DT-1.
Sapphire SP-7711: design appraisal workflow with stages RI/SG/UV/Raman/FTIR using polariscope, refractometer, Raman 532 nm, FTIR. Run Raman on inclusion at 532 nm, 30 s. Run FTIR scan 4000-400 cm-1.
Core BL-117 lake sediment: interpret palynology at depths 12, 24, 36, 48, 60 cm; compute pollen zones via CONISS; calibrate sample BL-117-C6 (c14 age 2840) with IntCal20.

function.name: classify_flock_size
function.description: Classify flock size by echo strength.

prompt: At Eilat radar on 2026-04-22: schedule calibration with metal sphere and corner reflector, ref RCS 0.01 m2. Compute Doppler velocity for window 04:00 to 06:00, and export tracks to Movebank.

Cinque Terre landslide hazard: model susceptibility with predictors slope, lithology, land_cover, TWI on training data data/ct-inventory.csv. Compute TWI from DEM dem/ct-2m.tif at 2 m. Publish hazard map for scenario RP100 as GeoTIFF.

Beneventan script chronotype study: corpus Monte Cassino, script Beneventan, letterforms a, e, g, t, date range 900-1100. Extract features stroke-width, ascender-height, slant from images set img/mc-bnv. Then cluster handwriting features at feature_uri features/bnv.npy into k=5 via kmeans.
Line CCL-3 casting low-carbon steel at 1.2 m/min with 1.1% mold taper. Set zones 1=120, 2=85, 3=50 L/min. Monitor breakout via thermocouple array TC-ARR-3.

Northern gannet colony at Bass Rock, design GPS telemetry study with 25 birds. Fit HMM with 3 states to tracks at tracks/gannet-br.csv using SST and bathymetry covariates. Identify foraging hotspots via fixed kernel with bandwidth 8 km.
Soreq Cave stalagmite SOR-12: design paleoclimate record with d18O and d13C proxies at 5-year resolution. U/Th date sample SOR-12-A at 0.5 mm subsample. Measure d18O on instrument MAT-253.
Register papyrus P.Oxy.4444 from Oxyrhynchus acquired 2026-03-15 in Greek. Multispectral image at 365, 450, 700, 950 nm. Then diplomatic transcribe image scans/pox4444.tif.
Tamahagane blade KAT-09: forge schedule 3 passes 1100 C/15%, 950 C/12%, 850 C/8%. Apply clay: edge 0.5 mm, spine 4 mm. Quench in 28 C water.

PAM array PAM-MED-1: 3 stations (lat 36.0 lon 4.0 depth 80), (lat 36.5 lon 4.5 depth 120), (lat 37.0 lon 5.0 depth 200), duty cycle 10 min on / 50 min off. Train fin whale detector on data/fin-mediterranean.zip with ResNet18 for 40 epochs. Then estimate density with half-normal detection function.
Parcel PCL-2026-04: stones D-1, D-2, D-3 for 4C grading by operators 'Anna' and 'Boris', priority rush. Sarine scan D-1 at 5 um resolution. Laser inscribe 'GIA-77711' on D-1 girdle at 4 um depth.

Alluvial fan ATAC-FAN-12 in Atacama: catchment 84 km2, sediment flux 6500 m3/yr, slope 4.2 deg. Compute avulsion threshold at channel aspect ratio 18. OSL date surface samples ATC-F12-S1, ATC-F12-S2, ATC-F12-S3.

EDDL survey at British Library on shelfmarks Cotton Vitellius A.xv, Royal 8 D.xiii starting 2026-06-01, features quire-structure, ruling, binding, pricking. Extract quire structure of Cotton Vitellius A.xv, then identify its binding pattern as Romanesque.
Workshop WS-2026-FALL: 8 students, modules wax-modeling, lost-wax, finishing, 5 days. Order 40 kg of silicon bronze from Belmont. Configure furnace IF-2 to 1300 C max, 25 kg crucible.
